data.content: [Claude plan_review 2026-04-02] Plan rejected for stale .loom file inventory. Design (ArtifactTarget enum, legacy aliases, parser validation) is approved. Two concrete issues: (1) workflow.loom has 'output remote_main' at 6 lines, not 'output branch'/'output commit' as claimed; (2) profile files each have 4 output overrides, not 2. Correct inventory: 14 line changes across 3 files. No loom-side changes required — grammar accepts any ident. Revise inventory and line counts, then resubmit.
